욥기 5:1.content: “Call now; is there any who will answer you? To which of the holy ones will you turn?

욥기 5:2.content: For resentment kills the foolish man, and jealousy kills the simple.

욥기 5:3.content: I have seen the foolish taking root, but suddenly I cursed his habitation.

욥기 5:4.content: His children are far from safety. They are crushed in the gate. Neither is there any to deliver them,

욥기 5:5.content: whose harvest the hungry eats up, and take it even out of the thorns. The snare gapes for their substance.

욥기 5:6.content: For affliction doesn’t come out of the dust, neither does trouble spring out of the ground;

욥기 5:7.content: but man is born to trouble, as the sparks fly upward.

욥기 5:8.content: “But as for me, I would seek God. I would commit my cause to God,

욥기 5:9.content: who does great things that can’t be fathomed, marvelous things without number;

욥기 5:10.content: who gives rain on the earth, and sends waters on the fields;

욥기 5:11.content: so that he sets up on high those who are low, those who mourn are exalted to safety.

욥기 5:12.content: He frustrates the plans of the crafty, So that their hands can’t perform their enterprise.

욥기 5:13.content: He takes the wise in their own craftiness; the counsel of the cunning is carried headlong.

욥기 5:14.content: They meet with darkness in the day time, and grope at noonday as in the night.

욥기 5:15.content: But he saves from the sword of their mouth, even the needy from the hand of the mighty.

욥기 5:16.content: So the poor has hope, and injustice shuts her mouth.

욥기 5:17.content: “Behold, happy is the man whom God corrects. Therefore do not despise the chastening of the Almighty.

욥기 5:18.content: For he wounds and binds up. He injures and his hands make whole.

욥기 5:19.content: He will deliver you in six troubles; yes, in seven no evil will touch you.

욥기 5:20.content: In famine he will redeem you from death; in war, from the power of the sword.

욥기 5:21.content: You will be hidden from the scourge of the tongue, neither will you be afraid of destruction when it comes.

욥기 5:22.content: You will laugh at destruction and famine, neither will you be afraid of the animals of the earth.

욥기 5:23.content: For you will be allied with the stones of the field. The animals of the field will be at peace with you.

욥기 5:24.content: You will know that your tent is in peace. You will visit your fold, and will miss nothing.

욥기 5:25.content: You will know also that your offspring will be great, Your offspring as the grass of the earth.

욥기 5:26.content: You will come to your grave in a full age, like a shock of grain comes in its season.

욥기 5:27.content: Look at this. We have searched it. It is so. Hear it, and know it for your good.”
